evaluators.name: Task 1 - 2-Day Adult & Child Pass with Mobile/E-Ticket Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added the cheapest qualifying 2-day adult and child passes for the same days under $260 and chose mobile or e-ticket delivery.

evaluators.name: Task 2 - Sunday Music Schedule Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added 3 qualifying Sunday music performances between 2 PM and 10 PM from three different stages to My Schedule.

evaluators.name: Task 3 - Vegetarian Mains Tasting List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added 3 vegetarian main dishes under $15, rated 4.0+ from different cuisines, to the tasting/favorites list.

evaluators.name: Task 4 - Free Intermediate Saturday Dance Workshop Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user registered via the on-site form for a free intermediate-level Saturday dance workshop starting before 3 PM.

evaluators.name: Task 5 - 'Saturday Night' Lineup List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a 'Saturday Night' artist list containing 2 headliners and 3 local artists who perform after 6 PM on Saturday.

evaluators.name: Task 6 - Youth Music Education Donation Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user made a single donation between $20 and $30 to a youth-focused music education fund using credit card and opted into the newsletter.

evaluators.name: Task 7 - Sunday Family Plan Activities Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added 2 kids-focused, family-friendly Sunday afternoon activities (12–5 PM, 4.5+ stars) to the Family Plan.

evaluators.name: Task 8 - Nearby Food Stalls Route Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user pinned three nearby food stalls (main, dessert, drink) within a short walk of the Main Stage and ordered them as mains first, dessert second, drinks third in the saved route.
